package rulefixtures

// scenario for go_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_large_slice_retained_after_truncate: Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag long-lived slices truncated to zero that still retain large backing arrays.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule540NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario540Negative(records []Rule540NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
